since_last: 70% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.34% · BTC +0.99% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 +1.37%. 70% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.03%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.03%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +10.64%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +10.64%, ARM +10.35%, AMAT +9.68%, LRCX +9.50%, MU +8.52%. Laggards: AVAV -5.44%, SOUN -4.56%, PLTR -3.06%, CRM -2.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.82% at $150.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
